parameters.query:
SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM automation_catalog WHERE is_active = true) AS total_catalog,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM automation_purchases WHERE tenant_id = '{{ $json.body.tenantId }}'::uuid AND status = 'active') AS actives,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event_logs WHERE tenant_id = '{{ $json.body.tenantId }}'::uuid AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') AS exec_total,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event_logs WHERE tenant_id = '{{ $json.body.tenantId }}'::uuid AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND statut_execution = 'succes') AS exec_succes,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event_logs WHERE tenant_id = '{{ $json.body.tenantId }}'::uuid AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND statut_execution = 'erreur') AS exec_erreurs
